reviews.comment: He would be available for help to anyone.

reviews.rating_tags: Lots of homework--Participation matters--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: This class is hard regardless of the teacher. Bottom line, if you aren't good at calc this is going to be a VERY hard class for you. Otherwise, go to class to get clicker points, get 100 on all LONCAPAs (BY YOU ACTUALLY DOING IT DONT LOOK IT UP). Mini exam problems are virtually the same as the LONCAPAs. Midterm was hard & final was ok. Good luck!!

Overall, his class wasn't that bad. Mini Exams weren't too hard (make sure you show ALL of your work), the Loncapa homework was difficult at times, and the lectures were pretty helpful. My only issue was the difficulty spike from the Mini Exams to the midterm and final, which were absolutely brutal. His class is hard, but he's a good professor.

Midterm and Final are brutal. Out of all the physics professors at FSU that teach this class, take him. Mini exams aren't that hard and boost your grade. The regular lecture and separate labs are A LOT easier than studio. Loncapa assignments are difficult, but if you have to take this class, take it with him.
reviews.rating_tags: Participation matters--Skip class? You won't pass.--LOTS OF HOMEWORK

reviews.comment: Nice guy and clearly knows the material, but he tends to make things harder than necessary. Midterm and final are insanely hard. Lectures often didn't feel very helpful, as he went over easy examples in class and then obliterated us with tests and homework. Sometimes material wasnt clear because he derived multiple different formulas for one thing.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--TEST HEAVY--Tests are tough

reviews.comment: Run of the mill physics professor. Has nice powerpoints to find formulas and concepts through. Pay attention to class and you should do well. Some of the homework is unreasonably hard but I've always gotten it done before recitation was over. Buy chegg if you need it. Mini exams aren't as hard as some homework. Built in points to help you do better
Dr. Hill is fine, but he has a habit of making students do work that's much more annoying than helpful. The class feels like an empty turtle shell sometimes. He's a pleasant man, though.

Be ready to teach yourself most of the material. Engaging but lectures don't have anything to do with Loncapa HW or tests. Midterm and final are brutal. How brutal? The average grade was a 55 on the midterm. As a person he's a great guy as a teacher, well, its physics at FSU. Invest in Chegg for this class, it'll be a life saver.

Lectures don't help, had to teach myself. Recitations are stupid as they make you go up to the board 5 times to do examples to get credit. Loncapa hw is always 10 times harder than what he taught in class. Nice guy but not a good professor. If you don't have a good background with physics, don't take him.

The best Physics teacher FSU has to offer. His lectures are crystal clear and makes it easy to understand difficult concepts. His exams are based on in class examples and loncapa assignments  easy studying. Do every loncapa and go to the recitations and you'll do fine. Beware the final though, its a doozy...

Will you pass the class? Most likely. His grading scale is curved. That said, if you are hoping to actually learn physics, don't take him. All he does is read off the book-supplied powerpoint and have you memorize formulas. He does a horrible job explaining things. Try to take someone else.
I don't know what to say, okay kinda boring. Mini exams straight from loncapa! His exams are pretty difficult, take good notes in lecture and you should be fine.

Couldn't have asked for a better physics teacher. Very helpful and cares about his students. I've taken 2 classes and plan on taking a third physics class with him. I recommend him to any physics student.

I have a problem with the way Physics is taught at FSU and many other colleges.   Combine a horrific and ridiculously short textbook for which the school receives kick-backs from Pearson, a nearly free but outdated and cumbersome homework platform(Lon-capa)and complete lack of consistency in instruction, and you have corporate pedagogy at its best

Awesome Professor! Simply one of the best I have ever had! Explained material very, very well, and did demonstrations every class which illustrated the material. Best 5 of 6 "Mini-Exams" for 25% of your grade. 10% Midterm and 20% Final. Remaining 45% comprised of easy LONCAPA problems, lab, attendance, and recitation. Two thumbs up for this teacher

You get what you put in. Prof. Holmes is an amazing caring articulate human person. The "activities notebook" takes 16hrs & should not be left until the end of the semester; unless you work overnight at a pier. She'll hold you accountable in a fair way and is always available via email; Fast responses. Wish she taught all my classes. #5ChiliPeppers
My teacher rocks, GO MRS. GILMORE!
The worst! Her recreation class at FSU PC is an absolute joke! Don't take her, take an online class and save yourself the hassel!

reviews.comment: My professor is AMZING!!!! She love to teach and her students! She is very excited about events and offers great extra credit!
A lot of games and fun activities.

Boring class and wouldn't recommend The exams are not hard but he is looking for specific answers that he mentions in class. reviews.comment: Distinguished, intelligent professor. Dr. Holcombe has published 15 books and over 150 articles. Florida State is lucky to have him on board and I was lucky to take him for market ethics this semester. Learned quite a bit and got an A.

I had a very sub-satisfactory experience with professor Holcombe. His lectures were scattered and he wasted a lot of time. I didn't learn very much in this class. He doesn't use Blackboard and he also does not answer email reliably. It was hard to gauge what I even learned in this class. Very opinionated and rude to students. I'd avoid his classes

I hated this professor at first.  He was too hard, too mean, and too opinionated.  But i think I have to say that his class on public sector economics was the kind of class that really enhances the value of your education.  You hate it while you suffer through it, but you're surprised how much you retain.
He is a great teacher! His lectures are to the point and easy to understand. If you go to his lectures and pay attention, you can get an easy A. You don't need the book, just take good notes!
Dude Wally is soooo awesomee!!!!!and so is M HULK, not to hard on the eyes either

He is not a bad teacher. I did good on the midterm and got a A on the 20pg paper. But I got too comfortable and failed the final. I ended up getting a C in the class. It is a boring class but try to stay focus.
GOOD MORNING SCHOLARS!!! great teacher...must go to class though...20 page paper but graded very broad...great class...learn a lot...recommend him.

Mr. Holcombe is extremely intelligent and a good teacher. However, if you do not go to class you will not pass this class. The tests are about 5-8 questions long and are short essay questions. As long as you go to class and take notes your fine. The tests are simple and based off what he teaches. Don't buy the book.

If you don't go to class your pretty much screwed, no matter how much you read the book. And his tests are only like 7 questions long, so you have to know everything to get a good grade. The actual lecture is so boring, I couldn't pay attention no matter how hard I tried, so unless you are a die hard economics lover...steer clear!!!
Easy to get a good grade just show up and he practically goes over the test, be sure to take good notes, test is based off of notes in class, no need to buy the book

The tone of the professor and course is intimidating and unwelcoming. Small issues are treated as major problems, and communication often feels accusatory rather than educational. The stress level far outweighed the academic challenge.

reviews.comment: Dude is just weird man. It's a very easy class. But this class is such a waste of time. He grades you on unique acts of kindness as a assignment. Not hard just pay attention to when he makes an announcement.

This class was a disgusting glimpse into the mind of someone who does whatever he wants in the class with no care for the individuals who are taking it. Every lecture he gave was 1. How much more important his research is 2. How much money he is getting from the Emirates or 3. About his son who he only talked about due to his condition. Sick.

Sweet, funny professor. Lectures are a nice change of pace. As a senior at Florida State, Professor Hochwarter has been one of my favorites thus far. The work and the lectures he put out resonated with me deeply. He is a very transparent and genuine professor, which makes him different from others. He offers a different perspective that others may disagree with if they are superficial and closed minded.

not the usual content for business, but it was a nice change of pace from the usual business reqs and cramming for exams I guess. assignments are not hard and reflection based, but take a long time so do not leave them to the last minute

This class has been the biggest waste of my time at FSU. I had an assignment where I wrote about what a man in a restaurant was thinking about which I think I did in 2rd grade. He is extremely passive-aggressive and rude. He cares more about the format which doesn't accurately transfer on all computers than the actual work done on the assignment.
might aswell rename this class to "I roach off of students for my research through unorganized surveys instead of actually teaching"

worst class I have ever taken, stay away from this class. you will learn absolutely nothing in this class. it's such a joke that I cant help but laugh. have fun writing about social skills and acts of kindness because thats about 25% of ur grade. if you like doing elementary school busy work, then go ahead and take this class.

this class is absolutely useless. U should get ur tuition paid for if you can make it through his lectures without questioning y u took this class. Quite literally the final boss of busy work that provides no educational value. Money is being spent for a class to do an assignment legit called "Acts of Kindness"  :I

Absolutely nothing valuable from the lectures and extremely low quality. However, the class itself is extremely easy if you just follow directions.

Lecture quality is pathetic: Room is dark, videos he tries to play on the slide do not have audio & he just sits there in silence for a minute thinking it is playing, & thoughts are hard to follow & shallow. Class work is time consuming & pointless. Feel more like english clas than a busines course.Easy A but is an insult to student time and money.

I'd like to know who is in charge of this dude, I mean seriously? I would challenge them to sit through one of this guys lectures. It's just a whole bunch of random gibberish on powerpoint with gifs and silly transitions, really odd and bizarre. A total embarrassment to the COB, it's clear they haven't monitored or reviewed this class in a while.

Not a difficult class but an extremely un-enjoyable experience. I will never comprehend why this school mandates courses from piss-poor professors who are 40 years out of their field and are completely out of touch with students. This dude is a complete weirdo and should have never been offered this position. Avoid if possible!

This professor is quite weird. I took MAN3240 Organizational Behavior, but I don't really know how what we did in this class related to that at all. Is this an easy A? Yes, but if you hate filling out pointless papers with completely arbitrary word counts, this A may cost you a chunk of sanity. reviews.comment: The whole class is busy work. Only available online. He needs to work on making the lectures more interesting (there were a lot of technical issues, needs to work on his video production work). Assignments have nothing to do with class. Easy A.

This class is pretty pointless. All of the assignments are very easy, and you are given full credit if you follow the instructions. Make sure to start everything early, as late work is not accepted. No reason to not get an A if you put in the effort.

Useless class that is required by FSU for finance majors that I had to spend money on. like others said its mainly just busy work. you will learn absolutely nothing in this class and the entire time you will question why you are in college and ask yourself why did I have to spend money on this course. college is a scam.

Unfortunately, this class will not teach you anything you don't already know unless you live under a rock. Wayne is very interesting, and will make you laugh. Says pretty weird stuff a lot.
reviews.rating_tags: Lots of homework--Graded by few things--Hilarious

reviews.comment: Spare yourself and don't take this class. His major assignment is the "personal relevance" writing assignment. Pretty much there are 9 lectures and you have to write roughly 3 pages for 8 of them. that comes out to about 24 pages of writing. The worst part is that you have to write these based on his lectures, which are just absolutely terrible.

Idk why everyone complains so much ab this class. Its pretty useless but its an easy A if you dont wait to do everything. Hes an odd guy but honestly his lectures were a nice break. The only thing I didnt like is that recruiting people for his research was a big part of our grade but again easy A. Quizzes every couple weeks but not too hard

This class was fine, however, I'm still not entirely sure what it's about? Wayne assigns only busy work - there are no real assignments or tests , only busy work. Prepare to write a lot about nothing! Also, the lectures are terrible - luckily you only have to watch seven. It is an easy A though if you are capable of getting through the writing.

Just an incredibly interesting guy with a lot to say regarding well being for future endeavors. The people who don't enjoy his lectures are brainy analytical nerds who spend eternity in stroz. Really great class and professor!

Def a professor who is far more focused on research than teaching. Organizational Behavior is one of the most unorganized classes I've taken. Nearly every assignment/lecture is pure busy work. Lectures are weird, run way to long, and don't really offer any insight. One of the worst courses/profs in the college of business.

reviews.comment: Biggest waste of tuition money at FSU. None of the lectures or assignments have anything to do with management.

reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Lots of homework--Lecture heavy

reviews.comment: This guy is the funniest professor I have ever had. He gives a big 21 page paper that is meant to be done over the semester so do not procrastinate. A couple other papers, some easy quizzes and annoying survey assignments (to recruit). Overall, very easy A. Just stay on top of everything.
Dont procrastinate and everything will be fine. Easy going professor who actually cares about teaching. One big assignment, few other assignments and surveys.

Really caring professor and the class is not too demanding. There is a lot of writing though, and if you push everything off until the deadline it will be hell. My only advice is to not procrastinate and you will be fine.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Lots of homework--So many papers

reviews.comment: Great teacher. Easy class. Not a harsh grader. Use paragraphs

Ok so I took this class during COVID fall and he really isn't that bad. If you just do all the homework ahead of time you can literally be completely done with this class in October. no, I am not joking. His lectures have some serious chaotic energy but there are some good bits of information in there. Take him, you'll be fine.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Get ready to read--Lecture heavy

reviews.comment: Worst class I have ever taken at FSU. Currently I am enrolled in the class. Lectures equate to gossip. I have learned nothing, let alone anything of substance. When I questioned the content of the survey he requires you to have 2 people fill out, he rudely emailed me back saying he is a tenured professor and I should not comment on the material.

I was worried about taking this class because of the many negative reviews. This class is an easy A if you put in the work. There are many assignments, but you are given a document with all the due dates ahead of time. Prof is caring and gave good feedback. Just don't be lazy and you'll be fine.

This was literally the easiest class I have ever taken. Hochwarter is really funny which makes his lectures easy to watch. The assignments are super tedious, but he gives you all the due dates at the very beginning of the semester. You're fine as long as you don't do the assignments the day before because they take so long to complete

Time management is the most important thing for this class. Hochwarter is a great guy who has some quirky lectures, but not a difficult class at all. Pay attention to details like deadline times and submission format and youll do well. He gives very clear feedback on where to improve your writing

Nice guy. Class is just so the COB can implement a writing course for students to take. While I didn't learn much, I did improve my writing with this course. You end up writing nearly 30,000 words for this class, so be prepared to write.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Clear grading criteria--So many papers

reviews.comment: This is the worst class I have taken at FSU in my three years at college. Hochwarter's lectures are scattered and unsubstantial at best and incoherent at worst. The course has taught me nothing and is chock full of useless busy work. Where is the material on I/O pysch and O/B? There was none. The course was about NOTHING. What a waste of time.
accidentally a 2 page paper as a word document instead of a pdf. received a 25% on the assignment bc of this one mistake

all i have to say is remember to turn all ur work in as a pdf. he doesn't care if u forgot he will still give u zero. last paper of the class is 21 pages so don't procrastinate it or u will be rethinking ur life. and remember pdf pdf pdffff
reviews.rating_tags: Graded by few things--Lecture heavy--So many papers

reviews.comment: This class is a waste of time but it is also extremely easy so just use it as a GPA booster. The assignments are long but you have almost the whole semester to do them so just spread them out wisely. The final exam can be replaced with getting people to take surveys. Remember... ALWAYS SUBMIT YOUR WORK IN PDF FORMAT.

To be entirely honest, not sure what this class was even supposed to teach. The course is basically him just giving a bunch of statistics. You are graded on lecture reviews, getting people to take surveys for him (and if one drops out he *will* penalize you) and a few papers. Very snarky prof when emailing. Syllabus straight up says nitpicky grader

What I dislike the most about this professor is that not only his class is a complete waste of time, but he grades you on your ability to get other people to fill out surveys for his own research. One of the main assignments of this class is to get 2 to 3 people over the age of 35, working full-time jobs, to each fill out two 40 minute surveys.
STAY AWAY. I HAVE NEVER WASTED SO MUCH TIME ON USELESS ASSIGNMENTS. HIS ASSIGNMENTS DO NOT REPRESENT THE COURSE MATERIAL. HE IS RUDE ANS UNPLEASNT.

He is the most unpleasant man to deal with. If you have a question or respectfully disagree with your grade he is super condescending and reminds you should be grateful. He is also extremely unreasonable just because he knows he can be. Also you learn literally nothing in this class because his assignments don't assess your knowledge on the subject

reviews.comment: Professor Hochwarter is by takes a horrible approach to teaching. I was really looking forward to this class, however i learned absolutely nothing. His lecture videos are screen recordings of videos online. None of it is his own content. All assignments are tedious and have no educational value. do not recommend

By far the worst class i have ever taken at FSU. All assignments are straight busy work. (21 page essay) T If you email him for help he will give you an attitude and is not wiling to help. Unfair grader!! STAY AWAY!!

The worst Professor I've ever had. Should be fired from Florida State University. Don't even email him your problems because he will only send you a copied and pasted response that means nothing to you.
reviews.rating_tags: Graded by few things--So many papers

reviews.comment: People who say he doesn't care are wrong, he gives personal feedback on every essay/assignment. He is very clear in his expectations and due dates, so there is no reason to do poorly in this class. There is a lot of writing, but it is more constructive and you learn more than memorizing things for exams.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Clear grading criteria--So many papers

reviews.comment: Professor Hochwarter is hands down my favorite professor on FSU's campus. His class is so easy. If you do your work EARLY you will be good. His online lectures are interesting and his class teaches you time management and how to be a better person. Please go to his office hours he is really funny and great to talk to.

Given the assignments at the beginning of the semester and are due at the end. GET THE WORK DONE EARLY. If you don't you will be stressed writing 10,000+ words in one week. Actually watch the lectures. They have great content that is applicable to you and your career. Was helpful in person. Has a quirky personality but kept the lectures interesting

Had him for online section because I thought he was the only professor available. Turns out that there is a better, much easier professor that doesn't just hand out ridiculous essay assignments. And good luck if you ever want to go talk to him, he's very uninviting and judgemental.

Dr. Wayne Hochwarter is an awesome professor. His writing assignments are based off his lecture videos but he makes them entertaining. Class taught me a lot but can be a lot of work if your like me and procrastinated until the last day to turn in the main assignment. Don't be like me and your all good.

Horrible excuse of a professor. He serves no use and teaches nothing. The assignments are busy work that absolutely has no educational value. This professor adds to the aggravation by being vague when describing assignments, yet grades extremely hard. With no educational value, it is simply a waste of time and money to take this class/professor.
reviews.rating_tags: Lots of homework--So many papers--Tough grader

reviews.comment: Get ready to write. And if you wait until the last week to do all of your assignments, good luck writing 30+ pages of absolutely nothing. Aside from the workload, this class is an easy A. Just DO NOT wait to do these assignments, get them done early. His lectures are about absolutely nothing. I did not learn a thing. All he cares about is research.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--LECTURE HEAVY

reviews.comment: This class is not hard, just tedious. A lot of papers to write. I wrote easily 30,000 words for this class. Lectures were very strange. As long as you write every essay, this class is an easy A.

Anyone below who has stated this class is difficult is just downright lazy. This class is an easy A as long as you read his requirements and turn everything in on time. The only downside to this class is that most of his deadlines are all at the end of the semester, so it is hard to know where you stand until finals week when he releases grades.

This class could have been an easy A with a different professor. He had extremely vague instructions for assignments and graded incredibly hard based on unknown criteria. This professor turned a course that could have been a positive and inspiring into a discouraging and, personally, GPA ruining class. Emailing him questions was a waste of time.

All 5 assignments are due at the end of the semester so if you wait to do them it'll be difficult but the work is extremely easy. You write responses to his (weird) lectures, 15 acts of kindness you did, and a biography and thats it. Super easy if you're a good writer and you don't procrastinate. I did everything in 3 days and still got an A
reviews.rating_tags: Clear grading criteria--GRADED BY FEW THINGS

reviews.comment: horrible class with tons of useless writing, if you do not like writing do not take this class.

reviews.comment: Prof Hochwasser class is a lot of work and he makes you write stupid papers about subjects hat involve peoples behavior in the business setting. In all I wrote about 25,000 words for this class in a matter of 3 weeks. Most of the assignments are a hundred if you complete it fully. The research paper is a lot of work and do it well its graded fully.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--LECTURE HEAVY

reviews.comment: Dr. Hochwarter is a really great guy and I highly recommend going into his office hours and getting to know him. You will be writing tens of thousands of words in this class. If you put it off until the last week you will be miserable. Be proactive. He expects nearly zero writing errors and his assignment directions to be followed to a tee.

Professor Hochwarter's Organizational Behavior class is essentially a writing class. I wrote well over 30,000 words for his class throughout the semester. There are absolutely no exams of any kind. He is research intensive and lets all of his students know about it. I suggest you don't wait until the last two weeks to do all of the writing.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--Amazing lectures

reviews.comment: All of the assignments are available in the first couple of weeks of class. It is all writing assignments, and you can be eligible to skip the final. If you do not procrastinate this class is incredibly easy. If you do procrastinate, get ready to type some 20,000 words to complete all of the assignments.

This class is not hard at all. He doesn't believe in tests and there are about 8 total writing assignments with 2 deadlines during the semester. They aren't difficult, they're basically your opinion or a review of lectures. Just do your PR's each week and don't try to cram a whole semester of lectures into the night before and you'll be just fine.

Not a class for anyone who doesn't like to write. You'll struggle if you wait last minute to do assignments. He cares about his students and designs the course in a way that encourages you to think and put your best foot forward.

I finished this class in 4 days. If you can't write do not take the class. Well, actually nobody grades the papers for content. They are submitted to turn it in and a computer grades it. So if you can write properly and fill in his boxes, easy A. Wouldn't advise waiting to finish the class last minute like I did. I wrote roughly 45000 words.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: If you don't like writing meaningless papers for 100+ hours during a semester, you're gonna have a bad time.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--LECTURE HEAVY

reviews.comment: Finally finished this horrible class. There are two specific deadlines throughout the whole semester. Lots and lots and lots of writing. As long as you keep up with your work and give him the amount of word count he wants, you'll be fine. If you get more than the participants he wants in his research study you'll be exempt from final.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--LECTURE HEAVY

reviews.comment: The class is literally all writing. If you do not procrastinate to the last minute it is an easy A. If you wait until the last minute, you will certainly not get everything done on time. Overall the class is something like 30-35k words total. Lectures are ok, but not very insightful. He means well and respects students.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--LECTURE HEAVY

reviews.comment: This class sucks a lot but I had to take it so I'm suffering through it. Just have to get through the bullcrap writing and you'll be fine. He likes to say he's a hard grader but doesn't seem like it to me. It just takes forever to write all the crap he wants. Don't take if you don't have to.
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--GRADED BY FEW THINGS

reviews.comment: Listen, I'm still in this class and it is the worst decision I ever made. I mean what person makes something due at 11:59 AM instead of 11:59 PM and makes you recognize that its due at noon and not midnight? SOOOO much writing and I love writing but this writing is god awful. Avoid this class if at all possible, get out while you can, save yourself
reviews.rating_tags: LOTS OF HOMEWORK--SO MANY PAPERS--GRADED BY FEW THINGS

reviews.comment: Take this course over the summer when you don't have a full class load. There are really only 2 due dates but there's like 10 assignments per due date so truly do not wait until the night before. Most of the assignments follow a specific format where you have to write the same thing 5 times but about separate topics. So keep ahead, easy A tho

If you do the work and do it on time, the class is an easy A. He really only cares about his research, so you won't learn much in the class. Although, I'm not complaining too much because he makes the class very easy as a result. His lectures consist of random videos, so I think he spends about 95% of his time researching and 5% on teaching.

If you don't like writing, you are going to hate this class. Honestly, the reviews here along with the business adviser not recommending taking Hochwarter had me so nervous to take this class! It was a LOT of writing but I love that there are no tests and there is a chance to be exempt from the final! Overall, it was simple  but lots of busy work.

Hochwarter is a pretty interesting dude. His lectures are kind of ridiculous but I appreciated his real world knowledge. This class makes you think and you will have to write A LOT but just don't procrastinate and you'll do fine. Your grade isn't only based on exams which is nice, and there's actually a way to get out of the final!

This class is a huge pain and it could be a really interesting subject if he didn't waste everyones time by making meaningless lecture videos. The content is easy but you lose a couple brain cells listening to him. I have not learned one thing in this course. The only thing I've gotten better at is writing enough useless words to meet a word count.

Any complaints on this professor come from the fact that people are just flat out lazy. There's tons of busy work but zero tests, which I would take any day. There's even a way to get out of the final. Do the work and you'll pass.

You have to write over 30 (1-2) page papers for this class. Why? I'm not sure because I didn't learn anything. Idk what the point of this class is. His lectures drone on with basic knowledge then you have to write about how it relates to your life. This class may be good for those who haven't found themselves but for a mature adult... not so much

He's not bad. I took the online class fall 2016 and it's just like a lot of writing assignments all due on one day towards the end of the semester. I think the goal of the class is to see if you can complete them all without procrastinating because there are a lot. would take again- its not hard at all.
I LOVE HIM

The idea of the class is to make you THINK on your own. The other reviews are totally valid and true, as well. However, you start to formulate some of your own opinions, thoughts, and ideas.   Gives some people an idea of how ridiculous the workplace can be instead of the theoretical textbook version. It's a very realistic class in this sense.

Hochwarter is an interesting guy as he makes comments that make you laugh at him and not with him. The course consists of paper after paper with over 19,000 words at the end of the semester. The material is vague and when you ask for help it feels as though you are bothering him and he comes off as disrespectful. Easy grader but a ton of work

Should have listened to the reviews on FSU's subreddit. All you learn is useless factoids.  The behavior of the professor is bordering on DISRESPECTFUL considering that many students (LIKE ME) are paying a lot of money and taking out loans for our education here.  P.S Don't miss anything. Messed up a submission and it cost me 10 - 20% of my grade.

I agree with the previous review that this class has a very vague grading criteria.  It is hard to succeed when the instructions are so bare bones. Grading is very subjective and there is no feedback. A chunk of your grade is determined by pestering people for his research. And I really do mean pestering.   Good sense of humor, though.

Great professor and very nice.   However, grading criteria is a bit "vague" and since everything is due at the end at once, it's a big difficult to get feedback on how well you are writing your assignments and if they meet expectations.  Quite honestly, this should be renamed "Creative Writing".  Don't fall behind! Overall an interesting class.

Great professor, Great class. He is very quirky, but also entertaining. He brings in some great guest speakers, and the Binder, which is your whole grade, is easy if you get everything done early. If you wait until the last minute you are going to struggle. Definitely recommend!
DO NOT PROCRASTINATE!! that is all.

Comes off as a goof but it actually entertaining for a teacher. I am currently taking him for summer but wish I would of taken a different teacher. He constantly gives you assignments that are based on helping him do research for his own research program. Gives a bunch of busy work when it comes to writing. Id say about 20,000 words within 6 weeks.

He is strict on turning in assignments. You only get slides and study guide online. The test on confusing so study your butt off on the study guide. The exams are tricky. If you didn't hand in the work he won't help you out. He will not give you extension on the work. It doesn't matter if you sick, or prolly even a car accident. Dont take him.

While the assignments were short and easy, the tests are way too hard for the material we're learning. He gives you a study guide with the basic subjects but you have to go so in depth with memorizing the most minute details if you hope to get an A in this class, because the test average is 70% of your grade. It's the first A- of my career... :(

He's pretty odd at first but you get use to it. He is not a bad teacher at all but the subject matter isn't anything too difficult. However do not underestimate his tests. They focus very much on the details in his study guides (i.e. numbers).

Hochwarter is a bit a goof, but loves his work and is the type of professor you should want. Cares about his students and wants to see them succeed. You don't learn from the book, but what he teaches you really applies to life. Go to class and enjoy it, he's a goofball with a passion for teaching.
This guy is the epitome of professor. He eats, sleeps, and breathes his work. His research is well-respected and informative. I really enjoy his style of teaching. The guy is real. I love the class.

This class is a sad joke.  The entire class is based on Youtube clips and random statistics.  If your a management major, do yourself a favor and avoid this class at all costs.  I endured 3 classes before I decided to transfer into a class where I would actually learn something i.e. Perrewe.  She's great and actually teaches about Org. Behavior
Go to class and stay for the review you will do well. Great professor!

Great teacher, he makes the class go by extremely fast. We watched youtube everyday, and everything was interesting. His class is an easy A, but you have to go to class. I got an A- because I didnt turn in a few assignments. Test are very easy, he gives you all the answers.
Wonderful teacher. He is very enthusiastic and interesting. His class is based around youtube!!
This was a fun class. He is very engaging.
Keeps you awake. At first you find the class pointless, but he gaves us a review sheet, which made the class very easy. Attendance is mandatory.
Best course I have ever taken.
Best professor I ever had.

Has no clue about what the labs are covering and has even less clue on how to solve the problems he assigns. Will get into shouting matches with students in the middle of the lab. Would give 0/5 if possible.

Worst professor I have ever had. Dr Shafiul does not understand what it means to be an engineer, much less one who follows the ABET code of ethics. His incompetency knows no bounds and is a disgrace to the university and all students who have him.

Lectures are very dry, Although the smartboard is presentwith slides displayed, no writing on the very fast examples given in class is ever saved. reviews.comment: Absolutely terrible professor. Useless lab Instructor. Does not convey information to his students effectively. It is very clear that this professor is incompetent in the material he teaches. This professor is tarnishing the FSU Electrical Engineering program.
This course is interesting and taught very well. Professor explained the course material well and I really have better appreciation for microprocessor now.
The course is beneficial and enjoyable.
Best professor ever. Courses was taught related to real life and job which makes this professor teaching more enjoyable.

I liked Dr. Shafiul's teaching style. He also Provided link to raw code on presentation slides containing images of source code to provide better clarity for students on how an example program is working.
The professor provided several resources for the students to better understand Tl Tiva board and very knowledgeable professor.
Lab corresponding with lectures was very useful, as were the homework assignments.
I enjoy the course because I felt comfortable asking questions and professor answered them perfectly. Professor takes time to explain and is flexible to student.

reviews.comment: Very organized lectures and helpful Professor. I learned the most in his class and be ready to work hard.

If I was grading the lab instructor which provided assistance to the class, they would receive a 5/5. However, this professor refused to help saying, "I cannot determine what the issue is, that would take me at least two hours." Additionally, when code was offered prior to lab, it was often incorrect or missing key elements. The book is essential.

Again, this class offered tests which are absurdly long and repeatedly ask the same lengthy questions multiple times. Professor has taught incorrect material, shown cross-referenced resources, and dismissed proper methods on multiple occasions. Several times students were not graded equally despite having exact same answers without any cheating.

Professor doesn't have clear understanding of material being taught nor how to convey what he does know to his students. Tests are impossible to finish in allotted time since the exact same tedious problems are asked repeatedly. Tests do, however, come word-for-word off of lecture slides.

Took this professor for a number of courses and it was always the same. Very long tests - hard to physically write fast enough to finish - mediocre lectures expressing a poor understanding of the material by the professor. Most of my learning came from independent study, reading textbook, and lab projects. Succeeded in spite of his deficiencies.

reviews.comment: Very helpful and caring professor. Really enjoyed the class and lectures are very well organized and amazing.
Excellent professor.
His lectures are amazing and excellent professor. Caring, professional, and respected professor.

Not a hard professor whatsoever with little high-stake grading so I'm not sure why there's so many negative reviews. Genuinely interested in disasters and need an elective? Good class.

reviews.comment: class was borin but quizzes were not very hard.

Doc is great! Only grades are generally blue book midterm and final. Doesn't take attendance but his tests are directly from his lectures. If you don't show up just wikipedia the terms. He tells funny stories and he has hilarious political views. He also lets you go early a lot.

Dr. Phillips is a knowledgeable professor whose passion for history truly shines.  He is enthusiastic about every subject he teaches (I have had several classes from him) and truly cares about his students being successful in his class.  Encourages interaction with class.  Lectures can be long, but never boring.  Love this prof!

Attendance is not mandatory, but his exams are directly from his lectures.  I am currently taking my 4th and 5th classes with him right now.  Love his class.  Fun and interesting.  If you take good notes and study, you will be successful in his class.  His exams are 2-a mid term and final.  Count for 50% of your grade and non-cumulative.

I was nervous to have Grigorian after reading all of his reviews, but if you do all of the optional homework (he gives a ton of questions for every section in MyMathLab, each question has a step-by-step example) and go to his Zoom review sessions (especially in the beginning of the semester), you'll be okay. He really cares about his students.

Trig is hard but im taking it with LeNoir and have a 98% right now because she cares and is willing to help!

reviews.comment: Grig is truly an icon in the fsu math department. strict teaching style but will get u to master the material unlike any other. i wish he could be my prof for all of my math classes.

I went to office hours & told I don't study enough when I had an A test average. Extremely difficult class but I enjoyed it because I like math & pushed me very hard to do my best.

reviews.comment: I personally didn't like him at all. He doesn't do online at all. Which isn't that bad. But he also refuses to communicate through emails. (In fact, if we emailed him about what we learned in class, whether you were there or not, he'd count you absent). I also just didn't like the way he teaches. If you wind up liking him, great. I just didn't.
He was by far the best math professor I've ever had at FSU. Wish all teachers were as understanding as he is.
Honestly the best math professor I have ever had. Always willing to assist students. If he notices you putting in effort he will help you out.

Ok to those looking to take this prof but are scared of the awful reviews-listen up.  First of all if you don't consider yourself a good student you won't pass. Grigorian is one of the toughest teachers at FSU-HOWEVER-he holds multiple help sessions, has office hours everyday, and really cares about his students. He seems intimidating but he's not!

STAY AWAY. Attendance is completely random, miss more than 3 and you fail. Horrible professor and has a terrible attitude towards the students. Uninterested as to whether the students pass or not. Actually, he repeats several times each class that "you're going to fail and it's not going to be my fault." Tutoring zone is your only hope.

GREAT teacher.very time consuming class and attendance is MANDATORY be prepared to work hard! He comes off as mean & grouchy just to be intimidating..(it works!)Really cares about the student and knows everyone's name and face..he knows if you go to class or not. So just go to class and study and you'll be fine.
He's kind of funny, but don't talk to him unless you want to get slapped in the face. He is completely rude and careless

classes arent mandatory, but he's very good at remembering faces so if you dont go and at the end you need a point to get you from an C+ to a B- he wont give it to you. if you do go to class and pay attention, quizzes and tests are easy because the questions are just like the examples he does. overall, pretty easy. DONT BE LATE!

Fantastic professor. The first time you hear him, you'll be wondering who's voice he sounds like. It's Borat's. If you go to the lectures and pay attention, you'll do good. Let's be real here: it's a math class so of course if people get bad grades they blame the teacher. He's a good prof. and is very helpful. You just have to put in the effort.
He ia an awesome teacher. He really knows how to explain things so you'll retain them and he is very willing to help you if you don't understand. Only warning: Don't be late! lol.
absolutely hated him
I think he is awesome......my friend and I said he would make a good grandpa!

Avoid this dude like the plague. He single handedly ruined my sophomore year. Take a TA or grad student for a class like this.

He's really great at explaining things...I dropped this class last semester because I had an awful TA who couldn't teach.  This guy is really thorough and really explains things well...he's strict about being on time to class and about recitation, but it's worth it.  Good teacher if you don't understand trig very well.

to the person who commented on the class being difficult and him moving at a fast rate, this is college, he tries his best to see that we know stuff. he doesnt have to go back and review, but he does anyways. he explains things in a way that is easy to grasp and gives a lot of examples. math isnt a subject that should be spoon fed to you, basically, college shouldnt be spoob fed, but he makes sure we know the material and gives us extra chances at our hw quizzes, which more than enough. mr grigorian rocks!!
hes awesome! he always makes sure we know everything!

He often doesn't have clear instructions, and his TAs are extremely hard graders. When you get past that, his assignments tend not to be very difficult if you plan out some time for them.

The class was split into 2 parts - the first focused on GIS / crime mapping assignments and the second was mostly learning and using Structured Analytical techniques on real cases. Prof Andrews posts lectures online describing what he wants out of the assignments and posts a rubric. Follow directions & ask questions if you're confused. Good class.

reviews.comment: DO NOT TAKE THIS CLASS. THE ASSIGNMENTS ARE STUPID DIFFICULT AND YOU WILL NOT UNDERSTAND WHAT THE HECK HE WANTS FROM YOU.

In a word, HORRIBLE!!! HE is disorganized, does not explain concepts before giving assignments, did not give clear expectations,and the course title did not match the content. The syllabus kept changing and so did deadlines. His deadlines are based on what works best for him and not the students. DO NOT TAKE A CLASS WITH THIS PROFESSOR! EVER!

I will first state I did take this course online and it was my first Criminal just course, but OH MY LORD, DO NOT TAKE A CLASS WITH THIS MAN! You never fully understand what he wants you to do for an assignment and there is way to much busy work. Again, I was in a unique situation but he thinks his class is the only one your taking.
Great profesor would take again. He was very clear and gave lots of directions.

He doesn't explain what he wants for his projects, presentations, or his tests/quizzes well. His communication skills are lacking; gets confused by what you are asking and often gives different answers to the same question. He can be extremely disrespectful to students. He's incredibly boring to listen to as well. Never want another class with him.
Very inconsistent with his grading. He is not clear when giving directions. Overall a very difficult teacher to have.

Professor Works is alright. Most of the material, I had to learn it by myself because I felt her PowerPoints are not the best (at least for me). The material isn't super hard. Every week there is an open-book quiz and programming assignment, they are both pretty straightforward. Two SmartProctoring exams which were medium difficulty.

Professor Works lecture videos are taken from UC Berkeley. Here assignments are way more difficult than what her videos cover. Extremely tough grader and assigned work over Spring Break. Do NOT take her class for AI unless you already know Python at an intermediate level. Has a lot of coding homework that isn't on exams. Waste of my time.

Dr. Works uses outdated lecture videos that are not helpful in teaching C++ at all. I struggled to understand most of the topics because her online lectures were vague and rather than explaining why she does something, she just does it and expects you to understand how it works. Although she responds to emails fast, her responses are not helpful.

Dr. Works cares enough that she is responsive outside lectures and is very helpful. She makes a brave effort to make her in-person lectures resemble her video lectures, and is merciful on turning in late assignments. However, she showed no interest in answering any programming questions I asked, and would rather talk about non-programming topics.
reviews.rating_tags: Gives good feedback--Lecture heavy--Accessible outside class

reviews.comment: Karen Works is hands down the worst professor I have ever worked with. Her class was poorly designed, her lessons aren't updated and became downright useless for later assignments. Her 'examples' are infantile functions useless for big assignments. It makes me truly question if she understands the material she teaches (C++). Will not take again.

Works is nice professor and easy to get in contact with, but the last few assignments that were more abstract were poorly explained and she wasn't much help when it came to getting clarification on what to do.

COP3330 wasn't the worst. I would probably avoid taking more advanced courses with her, though.

Dr. Works very caring professor who is available outside of class and is always willing to help students; however, her assignments are VERY poorly worded. Another issue I had in her class is that her office hours are extremely inconvenient. They take place very early in the week before you have a chance to work on the assignments.
reviews.rating_tags: Get ready to read--Clear grading criteria--Respected

reviews.comment: I liked Karen Works - before this class. Her assignments are poorly worded messes that you'll need to interpret. This goes doubly for her AI class that I had to drop. She shouldn't be teaching these classes because they've entirely put me off from both. Oh, and the Data Sciences class has 4, live presentations. This violates asynchronicity. Avoid.
Lectures are not enough for the assignments, you are gonna have to study by yourself. Especially avoid if you are in your final year
reviews.rating_tags: Tough grader--Get ready to read--Lots of homework

reviews.comment: Hate to do this but really am disappointed with her data science class. A tedious class that could be less tedious w/ some adjustments to the structure on her part (making us look for like 5 data sets per weeks, srlsy?). you also have 4 presentations and a 10-15 page paper @ end of semester lol no thx this class is WAY too much work for an elective

Dr Works is a great professor, unfortunately this time she dropped the ball. Why does a data science class need 4 freaking presentations? btw, this is an async class, yet the presentations are LIVE and I am FORCED to watch at least 5 others too. I have a full time job, can't attend live stuff. Had to drop because of this! Terrible & poor structure.

Dr. Works is a real gem. Her classes are VERY organized and straight forward. She provides amazing lectures, steps, and examples. I have taken at least 5 classes with Dr. Works already and I will take as many as I can. She really cares. If you have to reach out to her you will see how she offers quality responses and very fast!
Her course material is logical, organized, and deep. She really is top rate in that regard. I've never needed to go to her office hours to ask for help. Probably the best compliment I could give.

Dr Works is a great professor. I've taken her for at least 4 classes already She's very positive and in her lectures she usually goes step by step or provides you with a very complete example. You will have to work your way through the class but she makes it look easy. Everything you need is given to you. She's VERY accessible, caring and organized
reviews.rating_tags: Accessible outside class--Clear grading criteria--Amazing lectures

reviews.comment: Much like COP4710, the assignments were incremental feature additions and flowed exceptionally well. As always Dr. Works goes above and beyond to help. In this course received sub 5 minute responses by email at all manner of odd hours with thoughtful but concise help. A master educator and computer scientist!

Dr. Works is knowledgeable in databases, has worked in the field, and is superbly effective at teaching. I asked a question by email on the 4th of July after 11 pm. Dr. Works called me on my cell phone a few minutes later to discuss the issue. She is fanatical about helping students. Materials are easy to follow and supremely educational.

Ethics class is very writing and research heavy and this is not my cup of tea, but Dr Works made it fun and engaging. Rather than one massive thing the class is broken up into weekly activities and the info is easy to find. Dr Works is super communicative! Great class!
reviews.rating_tags: Accessible outside class--Participation matters--Clear grading criteria

reviews.comment: Such a great class and Dr Works is communicative and FAST! Grades were done the day after submitting. Feedback was detailed, constructive, and precise. I enjoyed the Pacman curriculum to learn about Agents and felt like I was getting Berkley standard of CS education, and it helped make the course fun! You def need the book! 10/10

This was the first class I took with Dr. Works. Interesting considerations and debate along the way. Don't skip the readings and keep up with discussions. Dr. Works is such a gem. CS overall is not easy and there were moments when I almost gave up but her encouragement along the way is what helped me to find my confidence and finish my degree.

This was actually a fun and interesting class. I enjoyed the semester project as we built it up in pieces along the way reinforcing the topics. Dr. Works is super organized and is really clear about what is expected. She genuinely cares if students understand the material and will go out of her way to help students when they get stuck.
Easy class, but Karen had a hard time answering specific and in depth questions being taught. Maybe because it is her first time teaching it?
I had a terrible time with this class. I didn't find this teacher very helpful either and there was limited support.

The class wasn't that hard, but Karen as a teacher has been terrible. The video lectures were worthless, and you are stuck self learn everything on your own. You can't get a question answered even if you paid for it, oh wait, we did pay for it! AVOID IF POSSIBLE!

Avoid her AI class. The original course was from UC Berkeley she just copied it, watered it down, and managed to make worse video lectures on the material. Terrible at answering questions. Makes students do song and dance to finally get questions answered and when then will leave you hanging to figure it out.
Excellent professor. Loves to teach and it shows. 10/10 - would recommend.

Was first semester AI was offered and ended up being one of my favorites. Dr. Works is a dedicated prof. She's enthusiastic, responsive in emails and grading, clear and organized, and exams/grades are fair. She will go out of her way to help a student understand and encourages questions. Follow her guidance, do the work, and you're golden.

By far the sweetest professor ever. She truly cares about your grade and will do whatever it takes to help you reach your goal as long as you put in the work and effort. Would definitely take this course again.

This lady is a SAINT! She really cares about her students and that we LEARN the material. She is fair in her grading and very accessible on email or Zoom. The course itself is just right, not too hard and not too easy. There are projects every 2 weeks and I learned a lot from them. Midterm and final are medium in difficulty. RECOMMENDED!
Pretty easy class. You do the assignments that are given to you and study the quizzes for the exam and you will get a good grade. Exams are exact same questions as quizzes.

Dr. Works is the most involved online Professor I've ever ever had. She responds to emails quickly and is very helpful when you are stuck on a problem. The textbook is useful for this course but not required, because the video lectures are so in depth. This class requires work like you should expect any programming class would.

reviews.comment: the WORST teacher I've had in my entire life. She expect you to watch hours upon hours of boring lectures and has no idea what she's doing, dont take her online class. Easiest class I've taken. Just watch the videos and pay a little attention and it should be easy.

Decent class if you put the work in.

not only is the subject matter boring, but he just can't keep me interested.

She is easily the funniest professor I've ever had. Dr. Kline will ensure that you succeed in her classes and laugh while doing so! She is quirky, knowledgeable, and feels like an actual human teaching you. I highly recommend you take any class she offers.
She is the best professor I know who really developed my passion for Psychology. I've taken every class I could with her and learned so much I consider her to be my mentor.

I love Dr. Kline class. She's such a fun professor and knows how to keep the lecture interesting. I would highly recommend taking her. The only assignments we had were the 4 quizzes so make sure you study.

Is very understanding when outside circumstances prevent you from attending as long as you continue with good communication. Does often go off on side tangents but tests were easy enough since they were open note :)

What an outstanding professor. She is incredibly kind, caring and considerate of her students. She makes me look forward to coming to class (as someone who skips a lot, I've never skipped any one of her classes). I'll be taking her other classes next semester.

Very kind professor who genuinely cares about everyone of her students. Participation not mandatory, but best to be in class since she gives easy extra credit for almost every lecture. Replaces lowest test grade. Tests are note-heavy rather than textbook-heavy. Main complaint is that her lectures can be disorganized and get off topic too often.
Very good! Very good dancer too

She cares a lot and wants her students to learn and pass. I plan on taking her for as many classes as possible while at FSU. Class attendance is not mandatory but I highly recommend going, it makes the class easier.

Dr. Kline was my favorite college professor, hands down. She really cares about her "academic children." She is extremely approachable and keeps class interesting. You will need to study a little bit-you won't be able to miss half the semester and do well on tests. She regularly offers extra credit participation and drops your lowest test grade.

Her tests are kinda hard but she has a drop test. Don't buy the textbook. She complains about her ex husband a lot and her stories are strange. She gives lots of in class extra credit.
Dr. Kline is great I have had her for several classes and she is dedicated, caring, and explains the material very well. I would not say the test are easy but the book is used.

This is my third semester as a Psychology student at FSU PC.  Dr. Kline is by far my favorite teacher I have had at FSU!  She is well-educated, funny, easy to work with, and friendly.  I would highly recommend taking her for any classes that she offers!
Psych of personality class was pretty easy. 4 exams and drops the lowest score! definitely reccommended!
Keeps class interesting

Dr Kline is one of the best teacher's I've had in a very long time.  She is very intelligent and has a true love of the subject matter. I would recommend Dr Kline's classes to anyone!!

Dr. Kline is brilliant. Look at her website: www.kelleykline.com and you will begin to get an idea through her ciriculum via. She is amazing! Learning from her was a gift, i lok foward to all the other psch professors at FSU as well. GREAT TEAM

She is fabulous, do the study guide and you should ace the test. Attend class and you will attain great knowledge. Small paper, three test(drop lowest score) and chances for extra credit. JUST SHOW UP FOR LECTURES and you should breeze through the test
This prof. really knows her stuff. She likes to joke around. -Anything for a laugh.  She made a boring subject (to me)so much more fun!
This professor gave me the creeps.  Many of her facts were in error too.  All in all, I have no idea how she manages to keep her job.  She's really insecure, and seems really dishonest.

i took profiling psychopathology... which was a GREAT class.. one of the most interesting classes i have ever had also a couple other classes which i loved.  i learned a lot, and kline give out a ton of extra study material to help students.  she is AMAZING!

Unbelievable teacher...Very motivated, really knows her stuff, learned a whole lot.
Great professor....enlightning and outstanding

Prof. Brodhead prepared me the most of all the instructors I have taken. She taught the hardest classes. It took a lot of effort and hard work. But she had clear expectations in all the classes I took. Highly recommended!

reviews.comment: Please, to save you the headache, avoid this teacher at all cost. I have never seen such an inconsistent, confusing, and strict teacher combined into one like this. Her lectures are very confusing and do not prepare you for projects and other assignments.

Katie Brodhead is an excellent professor. Her videos are great. I've had her for three semesters and I must say she is my favorite professor!  She makes hard classes easy.  Recently she had to leave to care for ailing family member mid-semester. She was replaced by someone not so good. :( I miss her weekly videos. Do yourself a favor and take her.

Unclear grading expectations & generally unresponsive. After week 10, video lectures stopped without explanation, and she only provides recycled PPT slides dating back to 2004. Book is complicated and not very helpful. Also, she unexpectedly quit 2/3rds into the semester. Had to learn on my own. At least had some XC. What am I paying tuition for??

She just read powerpoint for each lecture, very quickly to go through. It's hard to understand since she didn't give you any clear/useful examples to help you to understand.
I don't know why some people think it is useful if a teacher just reads slides. Do not take this class.

Dr. Brodhead's videos are excellent. Goto each weekly module and watch. If you submit every problem and do the extra credit and seek help when you don't know, you will do well. If you don't, expect a poor grade. She is easy to talk to.

reviews.comment: The worst class I've ever taken, average for assignments was 50%. NO video lectures whatsoever. Problems given are obscure in what she expects you to write. The lecture notes are by every definition of the word, useless. Just memorize the book 1:1 and hope that you can decipher the "right way" of solving the questions she gives.

Assignment and test grades took over 2 months to be returned. The midterm and all but one of the assignments were ungraded before the final exam. reviews.rating_tags: Accessible outside class--Graded by few things--Tough grader

reviews.comment: It's true: lecture videos end after the first exam, and she takes 4-5 weeks to grade assignments. It's unacceptable. But, learn from my mistakes. GO TO OFFICE HOURS. Tell her you intend to get an A+ and that you need her help to do it. Respect her time; try the problem set first to prepare thoughtful questions. Don't whine and complain, just work.

study guides  very reliable for tests, but no video lectures after the first test made it impossible at the end. didnt get test 1 grade until test 2 was due, still no test 2 grade. do the review questions in the book when studying to do well. can have harsh grading on hws, show your work on EVERYTHING. had to fight for credit on a test question.

The material is hard, but fortunately she is very easy to talk to and makes the material understandable. But don't wait until the last minute! She is very popular during her office hours, sometimes marathon in time, with many people showing up. She will help though.

She is very helpful in office hours and provides a lot of help there. However, grades for assignments meant to prepare you for the exam aren't graded until after exam week. reviews.comment: Dr. Krantz is a wonderful professor! I loved his lecture style and it was very easy to stay engaged. You can tell that he really enjoys what he does. Attend lecture and pay attention, you'll do well in the class. Dr. Krantz is very helpful and cares about your learning!

Grade consists of 3 exams so you must try to do well on all of them. Very lecture heavy and you also need to read your etext that you have to purchase for his class. Overall the class isn't hard but you must study and take good notes during class.

Dr. Krantz is a very nice and helpful teacher. His exams are the only thing your grade is based on, with exception of an option 10 point extra credit assignment. the best teacher and best advisor ever. so helpful!! love him!!

Worst professor and class I have taken at FSU. He is egotistical and finds it humorous when people don't do well in his class. horrible teacher. does not teach anything. goes completely from the etext that costs $50! he wrote the etext so it ramples just like he does. does not cover any helpful info in class. take it online. you will be teaching yourself anyways

awesome, very helpful, always has time to listen

Started off failing the first test i simply went to talk with her and she helped me sooo much. If you fail the first test chances are you will fail the rest. GO talk to her passed with a B- couldnt have done it without her help!!

Honestly one of the most interesting classes I have taken. She is extremely helpful, tests are not hard as long as you study the guide, and she is always there to help you! I definitely recommend taking this class

This class was slightly harder than I though a 1000 level class would be however she loves to have students visit her in office hours and can be a lenient grader.  She gets a little side tracked but does give a lot of extra credit and lets class out early.  She is a very nice lady.

She is the sweetest lady ever! The course is totally common sense, if you have a family. The quizzes she gives in class are extremely easy, if you explain yourself you get an A- there are no right or wrong answers. Easy A, and interesting!

she is terrible. you cant understand her at all and her lectures have nothing to do with the class. i do not recommend taking this class. her grading scale is completely unfair and her grading on assignments is the same. DO NOT TAKE THIS CLASS

reviews.comment: Dr. Lindsay is an awesome teacher. He makes the class fun. Yes the class is challenging ,but I love a challenge. Dr. Lindsay just want his students to learn and to be the best that we can be. Dr. Lindsay is also helpful outside of class. He will go the extra mile to make sure the students have the tools needed to succeed. I

He will do all he can to help you understand the concepts. This is a hard class, but if you put in the effort you can pass with an A or B. he goes over anything you don't know, and is always available. He also responds quickly to emails! Good professor!
